200.description: List of all active places with names, slugs, coordinates, and cover photos

schema.description: Response wrapper for the GET /developer/places endpoint

items.description: A place / location that groups properties by destination

slug.description: URL-safe slug used in routes and links

placeCoverPhoto.description: Cover photo filename for the place

latitude.description: Latitude of the place centre point

longitude.description: Longitude of the place centre point

status.description: Whether the place is currently published

pageDescription.example: Porlock and Porlock Weir sit at the foot of Exmoor, offering a stunning mix of coast and countryside.

modified.description: When the place was last updated

items.title: Place

schema.title: PlacesResponse

403.description: Invalid API key, IP not whitelisted, or origin not allowed

schema.description: Standard error response returned by all endpoints when a request fails (4xx/5xx)

statusCode.description: HTTP status code indicating the type of error

message.description: Human-readable error message, or an array of validation error strings for 422 responses

error.description: Short error label matching the HTTP status text

schema.title: Error

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check Retry-After header

schema.description: Error response returned when a client exceeds their configured rate limit

retryAfter.description: Number of seconds the client should wait before retrying

schema.title: RateLimitError
